# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'IAM Role for Cross-Account CI/CD Access with Secure Trust Policy'

Parameters:
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Organization ID to restrict access
    AllowedPattern: '^o-[a-z0-9]{10,32}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid AWS Organization ID
  
  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Description: External ID for additional security
    MinLength: 8
    NoEcho: true
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9+=,.@:\/_-]+$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid External ID

  RequireMFA:
    Type: String
    Description: Require MFA for role assumption
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'

  MaxSessionDuration:
    Type: Number
    Description: Maximum session duration in seconds
    Default: 3600
    MinValue: 3600
    MaxValue: 43200

Conditions:
  UseMFA: !Equals [!Ref RequireMFA, 'true']

Resources:
  CICDCrossAccountRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: CICDCrossAccountRole
      Description: Secure cross-account role for CI/CD operations
      MaxSessionDuration: !Ref MaxSessionDuration
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAssumeRoleFromOrganizationAccounts
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalOrgID': !Ref OrganizationId
                'sts:ExternalId': !Ref ExternalId
              !If
                - UseMFA
                - Bool:
                    'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': 'true'
                - !Ref AWS::NoValue
              StringLike:
                'aws:PrincipalArn': 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/CICD-*'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - !Ref CICDManagedPolicy
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CICD
        - Key: Security
          Value: CrossAccount

  CICDManagedPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: CICDCrossAccountPolicy
      Description: Least privilege policy for CI/CD operations
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowS3DeploymentOperations
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:DeleteObject'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::AccountId}-cicd-artifacts/*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::AccountId}-cicd-artifacts'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': 'aws:kms'
          
          - Sid: AllowECROperations
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'ecr:GetAuthorizationToken'
              - 'ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability'
              - 'ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer'
              - 'ecr:BatchGetImage'
              - 'ecr:PutImage'
              - 'ecr:InitiateLayerUpload'
              - 'ecr:UploadLayerPart'
              - 'ecr:CompleteLayerUpload'
            Resource: '*'
          
          - Sid: AllowCloudFormationDeployment
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'cloudformation:CreateStack'
              - 'cloudformation:UpdateStack'
              - 'cloudformation:DescribeStacks'
              - 'cloudformation:DescribeStackEvents'
              - 'cloudformation:GetTemplate'
              - 'cloudformation:ValidateTemplate'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:*:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/cicd-*/*'
          
          - Sid: AllowCodeDeployOperations
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'codedeploy:CreateDeployment'
              - 'codedeploy:GetDeployment'
              - 'codedeploy:GetDeploymentConfig'
              - 'codedeploy:RegisterApplicationRevision'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:codedeploy:*:${AWS::AccountId}:deploymentgroup:*/cicd-*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:codedeploy:*:${AWS::AccountId}:application:cicd-*'
          
          - Sid: AllowLambdaDeployment
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'lambda:UpdateFunctionCode'
              - 'lambda:GetFunction'
              - 'lambda:PublishVersion'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:*:${AWS::AccountId}:function:cicd-*'
          
          - Sid: AllowECSDeployment
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'ecs:UpdateService'
              - 'ecs:DescribeServices'
              - 'ecs:DescribeTaskDefinition'
              - 'ecs:RegisterTaskDefinition'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:ecs:*:${AWS::AccountId}:service/*/cicd-*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:ecs:*:${AWS::AccountId}:task-definition/cicd-*:*'
          
          - Sid: DenyDangerousActions
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'iam:CreateUser'
              - 'iam:DeleteUser'
              - 'iam:CreateAccessKey'
              - 'iam:DeleteAccessKey'
              - 'iam:AttachUserPolicy'
              - 'iam:PutUserPolicy'
              - 'organizations:*'
              - 'account:*'
            Resource: '*'

  RoleSessionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: CICDSessionPolicy
      Roles:
        - !Ref CICDCrossAccountRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: RequireSecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Action: '*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': 'false'
          
          - Sid: RestrictRegions
            Effect: Deny
            Action: '*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                'aws:RequestedRegion':
                  - us-east-1
                  - us-west-2
                  - eu-west-1

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the CI/CD cross-account role
    Value: !GetAtt CICDCrossAccountRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RoleArn'
  
  RoleName:
    Description: Name of the CI/CD cross-account role
    Value: !Ref CICDCrossAccountRole
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RoleName'
  
  PolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the CI/CD managed policy
    Value: !Ref CICDManagedPolicy
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PolicyArn'
